query:
-- Preview the workbook-to-service revenue match
-- Match on: same customer, same product name (fuzzy via LIKE), most recent upload
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS current_revenue,
  swl.amountExGst AS workbook_revenue,
  swl.productName AS workbook_product,
  swu.supplierName
FROM services s
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.supplierName LIKE '%SasBoss%' OR swu.supplierName LIKE '%Access4%'
JOIN supplier_workbook_line_items swl ON swl.uploadId = swu.id
  AND swl.matchedCustomerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  AND (
    LOWER(swl.productName) = LOWER(s.planName)
    OR LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(swl.productName, ' - ', 1)), '%')
  )
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(LOWER(s.billingPlatform), '"sasboss"')
  OR LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, swl.amountExGst, swl.productName, swu.supplierName
LIMIT 20;

JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swu.supplierName LIKE '%SasBoss%' OR swu.supplierName LIKE '%Access4%'
JOIN supplier_workbook_line_items swl ON swl.uploadId = swu.id
  AND swl.matchedCustomerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
  AND (
    LOWER(swl.productName) = LOWER(s.planName)
    OR LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(swl.productName, ' - ', 1)), '%')
  )
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(LOWER(s.billingPlatform), '"sasboss"')
  OR LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue, swl.amountExGst, swl.productName, swu.supplierName
LIMIT 20;
